# Orange ORM - The ultimate ORM for Node and Typescript.

> Fetch rows directly in the browser. Developer friendly, concise with with powerful filtering.

## Table of Contents

### GETTING STARTED

- [Installation](/orange-orm-docs/installation.md)
- [Connecting](/orange-orm-docs/connecting.md)
- [Mapping tables](/orange-orm-docs/mapping-tables.md)

- [Enums](/orange-orm-docs/enums.md)
- [Example](/orange-orm-docs/example.md)

### CRUD

- [Inserting rows](/orange-orm-docs/inserting-rows.md)

- [Upserting rows](/orange-orm-docs/upserting-rows.md)
- [Deleting rows](/orange-orm-docs/deleting-rows.md)

- [Basic filters](/orange-orm-docs/basic-filters.md)
- [Relation filters](/orange-orm-docs/relation-filters.md)
